title: DRDO DEAL – DRDO Paid Internship – 45 Posts
shortInfo: Defence Electronics Application Laboratory (DRDO DEAL) Recruitment 2026 for 45 posts of DRDO Paid Internship. Candidates with B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 03-08-2026, and closes on 30-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DRDO DEAL official website drdo.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: DRDO DEAL Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 45 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Defence Electronics Application Laboratory (DRDO DEAL) Recruitment 2026 for 45 posts of DRDO Paid Internship. Candidates with B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 03-08-2026, and closes on 30-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DRDO DEAL official website drdo.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.Sc.(Electronics) final year students with CGPA >= 7.0 and no backlogs in the first 5 semesters.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO DEAL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Defence Electronics Application Laboratory Electronics & Communication Engineering
